message:
refactor(dolt): remove vestigial embedded-mode artifacts

- Remove Config.ServerMode and Config.OpenTimeout fields (dead since embedded removal)
- Rewrite doctor/dolt.go to use MySQL protocol instead of embedded dolthub/driver
- Rename openDoltDBWithLock to openDoltConn, remove closeDoltDB helpers
- Delete dolt_nocgo.go stubs (doctor + store_nocgo_test.go)
- Remove cgo build tags from doctor package
- Update lock error messages for server-only world
- Clean up unused lockTimeout parameter threading in list.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,6 @@ import (
 	"context"
 	"fmt"
 	"path/filepath"
-	"time"
 
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"

@@ -38,11 +37,7 @@ func issueIDCompletion(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string, toComplete string) ([]
 	currentStore := store
 	if currentStore == nil {
 		var err error
-		timeout := 30 * time.Second
-		if lockTimeout > 0 {
-			timeout = lockTimeout
-		}
-		currentStore, err = dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: currentDBPath, ReadOnly: true, OpenTimeout: timeout})
+		currentStore, err = dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: currentDBPath, ReadOnly: true})
 		if err != nil {
 			// If we can't open database, return empty completion
 			return nil, cobra.ShellCompDirectiveNoFileComp

+			store, err = dolt.NewFromConfigWithOptions(rootCtx, beadsDir, &dolt.Config{})
